page_intro: Our products are backed by comprehensive warranties and industry certifications.

warranty_sections.title: Limited Lifetime Warranty
warranty_sections.content: Our cabinets come with a limited lifetime warranty covering manufacturing defects.

warranty_sections.title: Hardware Warranty
warranty_sections.content: All hardware components are warranted for 5 years from the date of purchase.

warranty_sections.title: Finish Warranty
warranty_sections.content: Cabinet finishes are warranted against peeling and delamination for 5 years.

certifications.name: KCMA Certified
certifications.description: Kitchen Cabinet Manufacturers Association certified for quality and durability.

certifications.name: CARB2 Compliant
certifications.description: Meets California Air Resources Board Phase 2 emission standards.

certifications.name: EPA TSCA Title VI
certifications.description: Compliant with EPA formaldehyde emission standards.
